introduction: Quantum computing is an emerging paradigm that leverages quantum mechanics principles to perform computations more efficiently than classical systems for certain problems. This virtual lab provides interactive experiments and simulations to help students understand quantum computing concepts such as qubits, superposition, entanglement, quantum gates, and quantum algorithms

experiments.name: Expectation Value Calculation in Quantum Systems
Quantum Linear Algebra – Matrix and Vector Operations
Applied Linear Algebra – Quantum Gates in Action
Quantum Kernel Alignment in Machine Learning

UG: Undergraduate students in Computer Science, Information Technology, Physics, and related domains
PG: Postgraduate students in Computer Science, Information Technology, Physics, and related domains

objective: To enable students to understand quantum computing principles, visualize quantum states and operations, experiment with quantum algorithms, and analyze quantum system behavior through interactive simulations.

courseAlignment.description: The syllabi of this lab aligns to the following universities in India.
